mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.friend_id, f.group_id, f.remark, f.create_time, u.nickname AS friend_nickname, u.avatar AS friend_avatar, u.signature AS friend_signature, u.status AS friend_status, fg.group_name FROM friend f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.friend_id = u.id LEFT JOIN friend_group fg ON f.group_id = fg.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fg.sort_order, f.create_time

SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.friend_id, f.group_id, f.remark, f.create_time, u.nickname AS friend_nickname, u.avatar AS friend_avatar, u.signature AS friend_signature, u.status AS friend_status FROM friend f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.friend_id = u.id WHERE f.group_id = #{groupId}

SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.friend_id, f.group_id, f.remark, f.create_time, u.nickname AS friend_nickname, u.avatar AS friend_avatar, u.signature AS friend_signature, u.status AS friend_status FROM friend f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.friend_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend (user_id, friend_id, group_id, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{groupId}, #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.update: UPDATE friend SET group_id = #{groupId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
UPDATE friend SET remark = #{remark} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
